pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:8 and export_result.sh:6 - user created by setup script via samba-tool group add command
setup_task.sh:9 and export_result.sh:7 - group created by setup script via samba-tool group create command if it doesn't exist
task_utils.sh:10 and setup_arkcase.sh:250-254 - admin credentials created during Kubernetes/Helm deployment of development ArkCase instance
setup_task.sh:10 and export_result.sh:8 - Kubernetes pod name for LDAP service running Samba AD
setup_task.sh:11 and task_utils.sh:12 and setup_arkcase.sh:35 - Kubernetes namespace for ArkCase deployment

privileged_info_summary: All metadata values are verified as accurate. This task uses synthetic test data in a development ArkCase environment running on Kubernetes. The target user 'alex_rookie' and target group 'FOIA_Processors' are created dynamically by the setup script if they do not exist, using Samba-tool LDAP commands. The admin account arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com with password ArkCase1234! are test credentials established during Helm deployment in the dev.arkcase.com domain. The LDAP pod 'arkcase-ldap-0' and Kubernetes namespace 'arkcase' are the standard resource names for the deployment.
